Home/Team
OUR TEAM

Meet the Experts Behind Loudoun Decks

A dedicated team of local craftsmen focused on building premium outdoor living spaces in Northern Virginia.

Nick

Owner & Lead Designer

Founder and lead designer of Loudoun Decks with over 15 years of experience in custom deck construction across Northern Virginia. Virginia Class A Licensed Contractor. Trex Platinum Certified and TimberTech Certified Installer. Nick personally oversees every project from initial design through final inspection, ensuring each build meets the highest structural and aesthetic standards. He has completed 200+ custom deck projects across Loudoun, Fairfax, and Prince William counties.

Custom deck designTrex & TimberTech systemsHOA architectural reviewStructural engineeringPermit management

Jeff Mineo

Head of Sales Department

Jeff manages all client relationships and project consultations for Loudoun Decks. With deep knowledge of composite and wood decking materials, local building codes, and Northern Virginia HOA requirements, Jeff guides homeowners through every decision — from material selection to budget planning. He conducts all on-site consultations and prepares detailed, itemized project proposals.

Client consultationsMaterial selectionBudget planningHOA submissionsProject proposals

Alex, Daniel & Bet

Master Technicians

Our lead construction team brings a combined 25+ years of hands-on deck building experience. Specialists in composite installation (Trex, TimberTech AZEK), structural framing, custom railing systems, and precision carpentry. They handle every phase of construction from footing installation to final trim, ensuring code compliance and exceptional craftsmanship on every project.

Composite installationStructural framingCustom railingsPrecision carpentryCode compliance
Get In Touch

Ready To Build Your
Dream Deck?

Reach out to our team of expert craftsmen today. Whether you have a firm plan in mind or need inspiration, we are here to provide a free consultation and exact quote for your outdoor project.
